---
title: "Praktikum Metnum (Model Numerik) 2026 Genap (Kurikulum 2024)"
format: html
page-navigation: true

listing:
  - id: modul
    contents: "modul*.ipynb"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, date]
    sort:
      - "date asc"
      - "title asc"
  - id: tugas
    contents: "tugas*.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, date]
    sort:
      - "date asc"
      - "title asc"
---


::: {.panel-tabset}

## Modul

:::{#modul}
:::


## Tugas

:::{#tugas}
:::

:::


Kembali ke [Praktikum](../../../../semuahalaman/praktikum.qmd)
